summary: Iteration 3 (Ball economy) backend + frontend verified. Backend: 21/21 pytest pass covering /api/wallet auto-init (balance=200, starting_balance/daily_bonus/pin_bonus/catch_reward fields, can_claim_daily), /wallet/claim-daily (first-time +25 -> 225, second-time 429), /wallet/ledger (descending, reason/delta/balance_after/created_at), /wallet/claim-pin/{id} (404 missing, 400 no-position, 400 too-far with 'Walk closer' message, success +5, 429 repeat), /spawn/catch end-to-end (deducts 1 on throw, common hit net 0 (-1+1), 402 when balance=0), /admin/wallet/{id}/grant (200/+50 with ledger reason='test', 400 for amount=0 and >1000, negative deducts), /admin/wallet/balances (includes 852 campers, has_wallet flag, 200 default when no wallet), /admin/wallet/ledger (<=100 entries desc), and auth guards on all admin endpoints (401 on camper token) and /api/wallet unauth. Frontend: Admin 'Balls' tab (data-testid=admin-tab-wallet) renders with balances table (852 rows), ledger feed, balls-in-circulation counter (170,459); +10 grant opens dialog with default amount=10, custom reason accepted, submit shows toast 'Colton: +10 -> 210' and ledger-feed immediately shows 'test-grant-ui' entry. MapPage mobile viewport: BallCounter in top-right shows balance=235 (auto daily claim from 210->235, toast 'Daily bonus! +25 balls' visible alongside 'A wild TEST_common_Spawn appeared!'). data-testids present: ball-counter, ball-balance, out-of-balls-modal, grant-amount-input, grant-reason-input, grant-submit-btn, wallet-balances-table, wallet-row-{id}, grant-10/25/custom-{id}, ledger-feed, balls-in-circulation, admin-tab-wallet. All core requirements met.

issues: On first-time camper, the 'Allow location' onboarding overlay covers the BallCounter so tapping it while onboarding is active does not open the OutOfBallsModal. Expected since it's a modal stack; after onboarding completes the counter becomes interactive. Not a blocker — noted for awareness.

critical_code_review_comments: adjust_balls uses max(0, bal+delta) which prevents negative balances but can SILENTLY clamp a negative admin grant (e.g., if balance=5 and admin grants -50, user ends at 0 while ledger records delta=-50 making balance_after=0, which is fine but the 'effective' deduction is smaller than requested — consider returning the actual applied delta to admin for clarity.
get_or_init_wallet logs the starting grant with reason='initial_grant' — ledger shows this correctly; test confirms reasons include 'daily_bonus' and 'initial_grant'. Good.

Catch flow atomically decrements 1 ball BEFORE the success check — this means on 402 (out of balls) no ledger entry is written (correct), and on miss a single throw entry is written; on success two entries (throw -1 and catch_reward +rarity). Clean and observable.
PIN_PROXIMITY_METERS=15 on backend; MapPage frontend uses 12m for auto-claim. Acceptable buffer (client stricter than server).
admin_list_balances merges wallet collection with campers collection so admin sees starting 200 for campers with no wallet yet (has_wallet=false). Good UX.
Mongo _id excluded everywhere (projection {_id:0}). No ObjectId leaks.
test_credentials: Admin: admin/Camp1993. Camper: first camper of B01 (Colton Ahern).
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_PinEconomy active pin, activate slot 1 as TEST_common_Spawn (deactivating all other pokemon directly in Mongo), create wallets/ledger/positions/group_spawns for 3 B01 campers (idx 0,1,2). Teardown deletes TEST_ pins and the wallets/ledger/positions/group_spawns/catches for those 3 campers so each run is isolated. NOTE: leaves slot 1 pokemon as TEST_common_Spawn active and all other pokemon deactivated — main agent may want to rerun admin 'reset defaults' or re-activate pokemon slots after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py is the canonical iteration 3 regression suite. Key testids: admin-tab-wallet ('Balls' tab), wallet-balances-table, wallet-row-<cid>, grant-10/25/custom-<cid>, grant-amount-input, grant-reason-input, grant-submit-btn, ledger-feed, balls-in-circulation, ball-counter, ball-balance, out-of-balls-modal, close-out-of-balls-btn, claim-daily-in-modal-btn. Catch flow test drives pokemon via direct Mongo (mongo.pokemon.update_many({},{'$set':{'active':False}})) instead of API to avoid 60 serial PATCH calls timing out. Spawn generation between catches forced via Mongo update to group_spawns.next_spawn_at to avoid waiting the configured min_interval (0.1 min).
